prompt_messages.content: You are a weak conditional verifier for an existing expert mechanism graph. Return only valid JSON. Do not propose new graph edges. Do not assert causal truth. Your output is only a conditional gate feature that downstream data, residual, validation, and reliability admission may reject.

For each selected existing expert edge, decide whether it should be conditionally activated, suppressed, or left uncertain under class, operating regime, residual, and temporal patterns. Use only expert_edge_id values from current_expert_graph_edges. Do not add new source-target pairs. Prefer specific, falsifiable conditions that can be checked by time-series residual/data support. JSON input:
{"dataset": "skab", "target": "anomaly", "task": "binary point/run anomaly detection", "allowed_features": ["Accelerometer1RMS", "Accelerometer2RMS", "Current", "Pressure", "Temperature", "Thermocouple", "Voltage", "Volume Flow RateRMS"], "feature_catalog": [{"name": "Accelerometer1RMS", "role": "observed_process_variable", "subsystem": "mechanical_vibration", "n_unique": 31964}, {"name": "Accelerometer2RMS", "role": "observed_process_variable", "subsystem": "mechanical_vibration", "n_unique": 35252}, {"name": "Current", "role": "observed_process_variable", "subsystem": "electrical_drive", "n_unique": 42271}, {"name": "Pressure", "role": "observed_process_variable", "subsystem": "hydraulic_flow", "n_unique": 10}, {"name": "Temperature", "role": "observed_process_variable", "subsystem": "thermal", "n_unique": 37593}, {"name": "Thermocouple", "role": "observed_process_variable", "subsystem": "thermal", "n_unique": 24917}, {"name": "Voltage", "role": "observed_process_variable", "subsystem": "electrical_drive", "n_unique": 26895}, {"name": "Volume Flow RateRMS", "role": "observed_process_variable", "subsystem": "hydraulic_flow", "n_unique": 1994}], "current_expert_graph_edges": [{"edge_id": "skab_000_Current_Temperature", "source": "Current", "target": "Temperature", "relation": "motor_load_heating", "lag": 2, "reliability": 0.45, "source_type": "expert_lag_prior"}, {"edge_id": "skab_001_Voltage_Current", "source": "Voltage", "target": "Current", "relation": "drive_electrical_response", "lag": 1, "reliability": 0.35, "source_type": "expert_lag_prior"}, {"edge_id": "skab_002_Volume_Flow_RateRMS_Pressure", "source": "Volume Flow RateRMS", "target": "Pressure", "relation": "flow_pressure_coupling", "lag": 1, "reliability": 0.45, "source_type": "expert_lag_prior"}, {"edge_id": "skab_003_Pressure_Volume_Flow_RateRMS", "source": "Pressure", "target": "Volume Flow RateRMS", "relation": "hydraulic_feedback", "lag": 1, "reliability": 0.35, "source_type": "expert_lag_prior"}, {"edge_id": "skab_004_Accelerometer1RMS_Volume_Flow_RateRMS", "source": "Accelerometer1RMS", "target": "Volume Flow RateRMS", "relation": "mechanical_vibration_flow", "lag": 2, "reliability": 0.3, "source_type": "expert_lag_prior"}, {"edge_id": "skab_005_Temperature_Thermocouple", "source": "Temperature", "target": "Thermocouple", "relation": "thermal_transfer", "lag": 1, "reliability": 0.42, "source_type": "expert_lag_prior"}], "max_verifications": 12, "required_json_schema": {"verifications": [{"expert_edge_id": "existing expert edge id from current_expert_graph_edges", "source": "source feature from that expert edge", "target": "target feature from that expert edge", "activation": "activate|suppress|uncertain", "activation_score": "float 0.0 to 1.0; conditional edge activation strength", "confidence": "float 0.0 to 0.70; LLM is weak evidence only", "class_scope": ["all or dataset class/fault names where this condition may hold"], "regime_scope": ["all or operating/degradation regimes where this condition may hold"], "residual_pattern": "short condition on residual or co-activation pattern", "temporal_pattern": "short condition on lag, spike, drift, or persistence pattern", "rationale": "one short falsifiable mechanism sentence"}]}}

raw_response:
{
  "verifications": [
    {
      "expert_edge_id": "skab_000_Current_Temperature",
      "source": "Current",
      "target": "Temperature",
      "activation": "activate",
      "activation_score": 0.72,
      "confidence": 0.62,
      "class_scope": ["all"],
      "regime_scope": ["pump-load", "transient"],
      "residual_pattern": "temperature residual follows abnormal current elevation",
      "temporal_pattern": "short-lag persistence rather than isolated spike",
      "rationale": "Offline protocol probe: motor current changes can precede thermal response under abnormal load."
    },
    {
      "expert_edge_id": "skab_001_Voltage_Current",
      "source": "Voltage",
      "target": "Current",
      "activation": "activate",
      "activation_score": 0.65,
      "confidence": 0.58,
      "class_scope": ["all"],
      "regime_scope": ["electrical"],
      "residual_pattern": "current residual changes with voltage instability",
      "temporal_pattern": "same-window or one-step response",
      "rationale": "Offline protocol probe: supply variation is a plausible condition for current response."
    },
    {
      "expert_edge_id": "skab_002_Volume_Flow_RateRMS_Pressure",
      "source": "Volume Flow RateRMS",
      "target": "Pressure",
      "activation": "activate",
      "activation_score": 0.70,
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "class_scope": ["all"],
      "regime_scope": ["hydraulic-flow"],
      "residual_pattern": "pressure residual co-activates after flow-rate RMS deviation",
      "temporal_pattern": "short hydraulic propagation lag",
      "rationale": "Offline protocol probe: flow-rate RMS shifts can conditionally activate pressure response paths."
    },
    {
      "expert_edge_id": "skab_003_Pressure_Volume_Flow_RateRMS",
      "source": "Pressure",
      "target": "Volume Flow RateRMS",
      "activation": "uncertain",
      "activation_score": 0.35,
      "confidence": 0.45,
      "class_scope": ["all"],
      "regime_scope": ["hydraulic-flow"],
      "residual_pattern": "bidirectional coupling needs data confirmation",
      "temporal_pattern": "direction may reverse under control action",
      "rationale": "Offline protocol probe: reverse hydraulic direction should not be strongly activated without data support."
    },
    {
      "expert_edge_id": "skab_004_Accelerometer1RMS_Volume_Flow_RateRMS",
      "source": "Accelerometer1RMS",
      "target": "Volume Flow RateRMS",
      "activation": "suppress",
      "activation_score": 0.40,
      "confidence": 0.42,
      "class_scope": ["all"],
      "regime_scope": ["mechanical-vibration"],
      "residual_pattern": "vibration may be an effect rather than driver when flow anomaly dominates",
      "temporal_pattern": "suppress if vibration lags flow-rate deviation",
      "rationale": "Offline protocol probe: vibration-to-flow direction should be downweighted unless residual timing supports it."
    }
  ]
}

verifications.rationale: Offline protocol probe: motor current changes can precede thermal response under abnormal load.
